name: Boston Chicken Creamed Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breast, cut into bite-sized pieces
4 tablespoons butter, margarine or canola oil
20 ounces frozen chopped spinach; thaw, cook, and drain
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, whisk together chicken pieces, flour, butter (or oil), garlic powder, salt, and pepper until smooth.
2. Gradually add the cooked and drained spinach to the sauce, stirring constantly until combined.
3. Add the diced onion and continue cooking until the onion is softened.
4. Remove from heat and adjust seasoning as needed. Serve hot over mashed potatoes or rice.
